claims: AC4.1: assembleWorkerPrompt preserves the base prompt and appends iteration context, fix-contract guidance, and per-US scope-lock content for the correct US.
AC4.2: assembleWorkerPrompt appends the AUTONOMOUS MODE section with PRD priority and conflict-log guidance when autonomous mode is enabled.
AC4.3: assembleVerifierPrompt scopes verification to the requested US or ALL and carries forward previously verified story notes.
AC4.4: assembleWorkerPrompt throws FileNotFoundError with the missing worker prompt base path before reading other inputs.

execution_steps.summary: Wrote tests/node/us004-prompt-assembler.test.mjs with AC4.1 happy, boundary, and negative coverage for worker prompt assembly.
RED: the new prompt assembler suite failed because src/node/prompts/prompt-assembler.mjs did not exist yet (ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND).
Implemented src/node/prompts/prompt-assembler.mjs with worker prompt assembly, iteration-context extraction, fix-contract injection, per-US scope locking, and final-verification branching.
GREEN: 3/3 AC4.1 tests passed.
Wrote AC4.2 happy, boundary, and negative autonomous-mode tests in tests/node/us004-prompt-assembler.test.mjs.
RED already established on the new suite before implementation; AC4.2 tests were part of the failing module-not-found run.
Added autonomous-mode section assembly that mirrors the zsh wording and conflict-log JSONL guidance.
GREEN: 3/3 AC4.2 tests passed.
Wrote AC4.3 happy, boundary, and negative verifier prompt scope tests in tests/node/us004-prompt-assembler.test.mjs.

Implemented verifier prompt context assembly for scoped US verification, ALL final verification, previously verified notes, and optional autonomous guidance.

Wrote AC4.4 happy, boundary, and negative FileNotFoundError tests in tests/node/us004-prompt-assembler.test.mjs.
RED already established on the new suite before implementation; AC4.4 tests were part of the failing module-not-found run.
Added FileNotFoundError and required base-file checks so missing worker or verifier prompt bases fail explicitly.
GREEN: 3/3 AC4.4 tests passed.
